name: microwebstacks-docs-preview
description: Preview astro-huge-doc rendered Markdown documentation inside VS Code.

commands.title: MicroWebStacks: Preview Docs in VS Code

enumDescriptions: Prefer a local workspace checkout, then a previously installed engine, then install from the npm registry.
Only use a local workspace checkout or enginePath. Never contacts the npm registry (fully offline).
Skip local checkout discovery and use (or install) the published @microwebstacks/md-render engine.
microwebstacks.preview.engineSource.description: Where the docs rendering engine is sourced from. 'auto' always falls back to a local checkout before installing from the registry.

microwebstacks.preview.enginePath.description: Path to an astro-huge-doc repository checkout used as the engine. Highest priority in every engineSource mode. Only needed when the extension cannot infer the engine path.

microwebstacks.preview.docsRoot.description: Optional path to the documentation root inside the workspace. Defaults to manifest output.content when manifest.yaml exists, otherwise the workspace folder.
